craftinginfo-aqueducts-text:
Aqueducts
Aqueducts can be used to transport water long distances.

Aqueduct sections must be placed adjacent to a water source, with one of the open sides facing the source. Further sections can be placed and will create non-source water provided that the original source block is not removed nor the sections disconnected.

Rapids
When the supply chain resolves entirely to vanilla rapids (rapidwater), the channel carries directional rapids aligned to the run. If any feeder in that chain is ordinary fresh water, the channel stays ordinary water (prefer-normal). T- and cross-shaped sections may not pick a single flow direction; use straight runs for predictable rapids. Toggle EnableAqueductRapids in the mod config to disable this behavior.

Vanilla water wheels still replace rapids where they touch the wheel; that is unchanged.
